pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy pickin' Saudi Arabia like they're about to buy a dynasty — son, they're gettin' washed.** Zach's Brazil is steppin' up to the plate today, and they're comin' in hot, takin' on Bubba G's Morocco in East Rutherford. Morocco's shown they've got some fight in 'em, but Gunner's pickin' DR Congo like he's hearin' whispers from his tarot reader ain't doin' him any favors in the standings — he might need a miracle here. Zach's still sittin' pretty on a goose egg with zero points, so Brazil's his last shot at salvagin' some dignity. I'm callin' it now: Brazil's gonna put on a samba masterclass and send Bubba G back to the drawing board with nothin' but tears in his pint.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach Poised to Gain First Points with Switzerland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Analysts believe Qatar may be Zach’s best chance yet for success.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gayden's Turkey Set to Dominate Against Undrafted Australia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's strategic underdog picks might actually pay off this time.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin Eyes Expansion of Lead with Haiti vs Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Haiti aims to spice up Devin's first place rank tonight.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Gunner's Morocco Will Test Mustard Boy’s Brazil Ambitions
pundit_takes.subtitle: A clash of Tier 1 picks: Gunner’s patience vs Zach’s desperation.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach, 0 points, clearly thinks this is golf where lower is better.
Rafe, your draft flopped harder than a fish out of water.
Rafe flexed on Devin, bursting his bubble with a 3-point head-to-head smackdown.
Sim underestimated Rafe, a teen sensation ignoring the odds and owning the chaos.
